inputs.titre: Lance Armstrong est déchu de ses titres

reason: The image captures the described aesthetic well, with the desaturated colors, discarded jersey, blurred crowd, and faded banners. However, there are anachronisms present. One of the figures in the background is clearly holding and using a smartphone (on the right side, top row of banners). Additionally, several banners have modern logos. While it succeeds in capturing the overall mood, these elements detract from its historical accuracy.
